basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Senior Project Associate Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be applicable as per the rules. Please refer to the official notification for specific details.

qualification.education_qualification: Four years Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines, Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines, Doctoral Degree with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines
qualification.details: Senior Project Associate: Essential: (i) Four years Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines from a recognized University or equivalent and Four years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services OR (ii) Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines or equivalent and Two years' experience in R&D in industrial and academic institutions or S&T organizations and scientific activities and services OR (iii) Doctoral Degree from a recognized University with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines or equivalent. Desirable: Experience or background in wireless networks, optimization, error control coding, caching, or wireless mobility enhancements, or hands-on experience in using 5G stacks like OAI. Allied disciplines mean B Tech Programmes with fundamental courses in the areas of Communication and Signal Processing.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Calicut Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 14th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Senior Project Associate role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 57,000/- per month, plus an additional 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Four years Bachelor's Degree in Electronics and Communication Engineering or allied disciplines, or a Master's Degree in Engineering or Technology with specialization in Telecommunication/Signal-Processing or allied disciplines, or a Doctoral Degree in the same specializations.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for the Senior Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Yes, depending on the qualification. If you have a Bachelor's degree, four years of R&D experience is required. For a Master's degree, two years of R&D experience is needed. A Doctoral degree may not require additional experience.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Senior Project Associate position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address specified in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Project Associate position will primarily involve an online interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Senior Project Associate announced by NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q9. What does "allied disciplines" mean in the qualification criteria?
faq.answer: "Allied disciplines" refers to B.Tech programs that include fundamental courses in the areas of Communication and Signal Processing, in addition to the core engineering discipline.

faq.question: Q10. When will the online interviews be conducted?
faq.answer: The online interviews for the shortlisted candidates are scheduled to be conducted on 18th June 2026.
